title: Graves PRO
description: ⚡ Grave system for modern survival servers ⚡
body:
# 🪦 Graves PRO 🪦 --- ## ⚡ Grave system for modern survival servers ⚡ Graves PRO turns every death into a polished, configurable, and fair recovery experience. No more random item loss, no more frustration, and no clunky setup.
--- ## ✨ Why server owners choose Graves PRO ✨ - 🧠 Smart grave creation with safe-location logic - 🧰 Full inventory, armor, off-hand, and XP handling - 🧭 Built-in death compass with live grave info - 🔒 Configurable looting protection (disabled, instant, delayed) - 🌍 World filtering for Multiverse setups - 🧱 Indestructible grave blocks - 🖼️ 3 visual grave modes (default texture, player head, custom texture) - 🧩 Blacklist support for vanilla + Oraxen + ItemsAdder item IDs - 💬 Fully configurable messages and hologram lines - 🔄 Reload support and complete tab completion - 🚀 Optimized for Paper 1.21.x and production servers --- ## 🎯 Core gameplay flow 🎯 1. Player dies 2. Grave is created at death location (or nearest safe location) 3. Player can use a grave compass to track and inspect grave status 4. Right-click grave to open take-only GUI 5. Grave auto-removes when fully looted --- ## ⚙️ Highly configurable ⚙️ Every major mechanic is configurable: - expiration behavior - loot timing and permissions - XP storage percentage - max graves per player - void death mode - compass behavior - holograms and all chat messages --- ## 📢 Support 📢 - on [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sD4HvQh8P4)
